violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door stand up, the walk in cooler, and the sandwich unit. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2024

Raw animal foods Eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment Deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Food prepared in advanced was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler. The handle on the freezer door was observed in poor repair. The construction of the pizza oven was in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

Wood is used in the construction of prep by the sandwich station area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the establishment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food contact surfaces must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The facility mop sink was observed in poor repair. Sink would not drain. System must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The floor by the sandwich prep area and fryolator are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The hood system was observed with an excess about of debris. Hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
